sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68555" key="mono/knhmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-κνημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">showing one shin</tr_>, name of picture by Apelles, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1026.tlg001:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Petron.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">83</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
